title: GROUP_SEND: membership check on nonexistent group returns NOT_A_MEMBER not GROUP_NOT_FOUND
description: ws.rs GROUP_SEND handler calls is_group_member without first verifying the group exists (no get_group call). If a client sends GROUP_SEND with a fabricated group_id, the relay returns NOT_A_MEMBER instead of GROUP_NOT_FOUND — wrong error code. GROUP_ADD and GROUP_LEAVE both call get_group first; GROUP_SEND is inconsistent and leaks the distinction.
